THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. VISITING JUDGE CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF GREGGORY JOHNSON IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMAZON.COM SERVICES LLC IS REPRESENTED BY LILLY ALEMAYEHU APPEARING ON ZOOM IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
